body.title: Redesign inference as billing-type providers + a pure policy router + a loud/honest/proven reliability layer
body.text:
# D-inference-provider-router-redesign-2026-06-23
**title:** Redesign inference as billing-type providers + a pure policy router + a loud/honest/proven reliability layer
**date:** 2026-06-23
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-inference-provider-billing-model, T-inference-request-priority-split, T-inference-policy-router, T-inference-usage-cost-gate, T-inference-liveness-and-loud-fail, T-inference-honest-degradation, T-inference-strip-or-cost-rules-keep-proxy, T-consequence-inference-redesign

## Hypothesis
Inference dispatches succeed through working providers (ollama_cloud / google_free) routed by a pure billing-type policy with no provider hardcoded in env or rules; when inference is down every consumer (Igor included) says so loudly instead of going silent; and the engine is proven (router conflict-case unit proofs + a live canary) so it can't silently rot again.

## Measurement Signal
A live dispatch returns text; an Igor chat round-trip yields a response; `uu health` shows per-provider liveness + last-successful-dispatch; with all providers forced down, Igor replies "inference unavailable" and the canary alarms (red‚Üígreen); `git grep` finds no provider/model forced by INFERENCE_MODE and no OpenRouter balance logic in the dispatch path.

## Goal Link
none: serves the standing inference intentions ‚Äî Inference-Proxy-only, Ollama/free-inference as the target ‚Äî plus the proof + observability + CP1-honesty values. Goal layer retired for intentions. Side effect: satisfies project_ds_cost_constraint (DS was gated on exactly the free inference that now works ‚Üí DS unblocked).

## Decision narrative
Three symptoms ‚Äî dark (no-op) audits, `IntentExtractor` errors on every ticket-file, and Igor going mute ‚Äî traced to ONE dead path: the inference proxy routes every tier to `openrouter`, OR is disabled, and the proxy fails closed in front of working sources. The self-test proved `ollama_cloud` ‚úì and `google_free` ‚úì answer right now; `local_ollama` is reachable but 404s; `openrouter` is correctly gone. **Inference isn't broken ‚Äî the routing points at a dead source.** And nobody noticed because nothing proved the path live ‚Äî it failed to *silence*, discovered by accident.

Two category errors named: (1) `INFERENCE_MODE` welds foreground/background to a hardcoded provider ‚Äî priority is a request property, provider is a routing outcome; an env var must never pin a supplier. (2) The engine had no proof, so a core shared dependency rotted in the dark.

**Redesign (built right, one decision ‚Äî no incremental Step-0 patch; the system is already fully down with no users, so there is no blast radius to protect):**
- **4-axis split:** Request carries priority (fg/bg) + capability + limits, never a provider. Provider (install-configured) declares a **billing type** ‚Äî local / subscription / usage ‚Äî plus models/capabilities/liveness and (usage only) a cost gate. A **pure policy Router** `(request, available_providers, policy)‚Üí(provider,model)` picks by a preference order over billing TYPES (default `local‚Üísubscription‚Üíusage`), constrained by capability ‚Äî replacing rules_engine's hardcoded OR tiers. **Cost gate** = a general per-usage-provider budget constraint; local/subscription bypass. General by construction (works for anyone's provider mix ‚Äî subscription/usage/local ‚Äî not just ours).
- **Inbound bridge (advisor catch):** callers emit concrete model IDs (anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, llama3, openai/gpt-4o-mini); the registry maps every legacy ID ‚Üí a capability tier (unknown ‚Üí default) so real traffic resolves and Igor's round-trip passes.
- **Reliability layer (what would have caught Igor-mute):** loud-fail (zero-providers = health RED announced, not silent per-call error), honest degradation (every consumer says "inference unavailable" rather than going silent ‚Äî CP1, silence is a lie), visible (`uu health` shows per-provider liveness + last-successful-dispatch), and a continuous canary (real dispatch through the proxy + Igor's full loop, alarms on fail).
- **Proofs:** the router is pure ‚Üí unit-provable on CONFLICT cases (over-budget‚Üískip, preferred-down‚Üínext tier, capability excludes too-weak local, legacy-ID‚Üíroutes); finishing the router IS the restore (live dispatch + live Igor round-trip in its completion criteria). The thing that had no proof gets proven first.
- **Rules cleanup:** strip the OR/Anthropic *cost* rules (palace rules/budget, day-close Step 8 OR-burn, cc-minion/igor-constraints cost language); **keep + reframe** inference-proxy-only as routing-not-cost; **update** (not delete) the cost memories to "satisfied ‚Äî free inference live, DS unblocked," preserving the why.

**Interim policy (maps onto the model with no special-casing):** ollama_cloud = subscription (primary), google_free = usage (spillover), local_ollama = local (preferred-when-up once the 404 is fixed). Later: Mac Studio (M1 Max) = the primary `local` provider ‚Äî cloud drops to fallback, no code change.

**Assumptions (override if wrong):** ollama_cloud is a subscription (sorts above usage); policy hardcoded `local‚Üísub‚Üíusage` now, pulled to per-install config when the Apple lands.

**Alternatives considered & rejected:** (a) quick Step-0 repoint then redesign ‚Äî rejected: counter to do-it-right, and no live service/users to protect (system already down). (b) keep INFERENCE_MODE as provider selector ‚Äî rejected: category error. (c) keep OR-specific budget_gate ‚Äî rejected: not general; others will have different provider mixes.

**Refs:** devices/inference/ (sources.py, rules_engine.py, budget_gate.py, self_test_sources.py, models_registry.py). Cross-ref D-skills-two-products-2026-06-23 (the `uu health` surface). Relates to project_mac_studio_inference_host, project_ds_cost_constraint, feedback_inference_proxy_only.
